data.title: Advanced Threat Protection
data.description: Utilizes AI-driven strategies to detect and protect against advanced threats.
data.technical_spec: Microsoft Defender for Endpoint, Machine Learning algorithms.

data.title: Zero Trust Model
data.description: Security strategy that presumes a breach is inevitable and verifies each request as though it originates from an open network.
data.technical_spec: Multi-factor authentication, Conditional Access, Identity Protection.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Data is encrypted both at rest and in transit using industry-standard protocols.

data.title: Network Security Group (NSG)
data.description: Filter network traffic to and from Azure resources in an Azure virtual network.
data.technical_spec: NSG Rule configurations, Inbound and Outbound Traffic restrictions.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Mitigates the risk and impact of DDoS attacks with built-in network defense mechanisms.
data.technical_spec: Azure DDoS Protection, real-time detection and mitigation.
